g.text: Read > Tag > Export — for working disks
Your floppy works fine? Great — follow these steps to
get your photos off, add camera/date info, and export.
If your disk is damaged or photos are corrupt,
Extract files from the floppy with original names.
Add camera model, date, focal length, and aperture to EXIF.
This makes your photos sortable and searchable in any photo app.
Organize, create a contact sheet, add watermarks.
